buildCommand: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/steamshare run build && echo '=== ROOT DIR ===' && ls -la && echo '=== build/ ===' && ls build/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'build/ NOT FOUND' && echo '=== artifacts/steamshare/dist ===' && ls artifacts/steamshare/dist/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'artifacts/steamshare/dist NOT FOUND'
